title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
content: OmniRoute is a free AI gateway offering unified access to 160+ providers (50+ free), including Claude, GPT, and Gemini. It supports integration with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, and Copilot. Features include RTK+Caveman compression reducing tokens by 15-95%, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A protocols, multimodal APIs, and Desktop/PWA support. Built in TypeScript with 8,060 stars and 1,362 forks.

title: 别只盯着最强模型了，Agent 场景更该看这类 Flash 档模型
content:
Chinese large language models are increasingly categorized into "Pro/flagship" and "Flash/efficiency" tiers. Pro models excel at complex reasoning and long tasks but cost more and run slower. Flash models prioritize speed, cost control, and stable task completion for production environments.

Testing four models on generating test code: Step-3.7-Flash completed ~80% in 5 minutes for 3.5 yuan (~500K tokens); GPT-5.4 achieved similar quality but cost $1 (double); DeepSeek-V4-Flash cost only 0.2 yuan but required more time; GLM-5.2 performed well with self-correction but cost 12 yuan with instability issues.

Step-3.7-Flash emerges as the optimal balance—delivering ~90% of Pro model performance at half the cost—making it ideal for high-frequency Agent workflows requiring speed, stability, and cost efficiency.

title: 這一年來跟著 AI 發展的心得
content: Vin from Taiwan shares insights on AI development. He ignores AI hype cycles, as good features get absorbed by major models. He argues consumer AI faces tough competition for attention, while business-to-business offers real opportunity, especially where companies lack digitization. The real challenge isn't technical but organizational—culture, relationships, and management. Mainland Chinese companies show strongest transformation drive due to competitive pressure. Manufacturing execution systems (MES) represent the highest-barrier, most defensible AI automation area, where sensor-equipped production lines will train specialized AI supervisors rentable across facilities.

title: 中国第一，直逼OpenAI，神秘“扫地僧”冲到全球前七
content:
Chinese AI system MopMonk ranked seventh globally and first in China on CyberGym, a UC Berkeley benchmark for AI cybersecurity capabilities developed for ICLR 2026. The mysterious team achieved 73.1% success rate, narrowly trailing OpenAI, despite having no official website or public identity.

MopMonk runs on MiniMax M3, an open-source model from Shanghai with 1-million-token context and multimodal capabilities. Its technical advantage comes from a specialized multi-agent framework featuring structured vulnerability memory, memory-driven exploitation, and parallel agent exploration with shared memory—transforming vulnerability reproduction from trial-and-error into an accumulative, verifiable process.

The achievement highlights a shift in AI competition from parameter scaling to agent execution capabilities, where harness engineering determines how effectively model intelligence translates into real-world performance.

title: 游戏仓6月PS图
content: A Chinese investment portfolio called "游戏仓" (game warehouse) reported its June performance. The portfolio ended June at 16.96 million yuan, down 3.029 million yuan (15.15%) from the start of June. It underperformed the Shanghai Composite Index, which rose 0.63% in June. Year-to-date, the portfolio is down 3.77% (665,000 yuan) versus the index's 3.16% gain. The investor acknowledged this as the worst monthly loss ever, attributing it to poor skill and stubbornness. The portfolio was started in August 2015 and has a cumulative net value of 18.96 million yuan with a net value index of 9.6451. A separate "main portfolio" (主仓) was down 7.71% in its current cycle.

title: Alan Kay on the meaning of "object-oriented programming" (2003)
content: Alan Kay coined "object-oriented programming" in the 1960s, envisioning systems where objects communicate via message passing, similar to biological cells. He later expressed regret that C++ and Java popularized an inferior implementation focused on objects as data structures rather than independent, interacting entities. Kay emphasized that true OOP should involve encapsulated components exchanging messages, not manipulation of object internals. He viewed this misunderstanding as a fundamental corruption of his original concept.

title: HTTP QUERY 方法正式官宣，一个能带 Body 的 GET
content: IETF RFC 10008 formally defines the HTTP QUERY method, a safe, idempotent verb that can include a request body—combining GET's semantics with POST's expressiveness. It solves URL length limits and complex query encoding issues while remaining cacheable. The method mandates Content-Type, supports various query formats via Accept-Query header, and allows cacheable responses keyed on full request content. Authors include Julian Reschke, James Snell, and Mike Bishop.

title: 刚刚，OpenClaw和Cursor杀入手机！Agent从此塞进口袋
content: OpenClaw and Cursor launched native mobile apps on the same day, bringing AI agents to smartphones. OpenClaw's iOS and Android app enables local-first AI agents with device hardware access, allowing users to chat, approve actions, and run tasks remotely via private gateways. Cursor's iOS beta lets developers manage cloud-based coding agents from their phones, including initiating tasks, reviewing code diffs, and merging pull requests asynchronously. Both apps shift human roles from operators to approvers, untethering AI work from physical desks and accelerating an era of pocket-deployable AI agents.

title: 字节200亿美元豪赌AI，但赌的是B端
content: ByteDance is shifting its AI strategy from consumer to enterprise applications, highlighted by CEO Rubo Liang's emphasis on "MaaS infrastructure" over the Doubao app. The company is reportedly seeking $20 billion in offshore loans for AI infrastructure, underscoring this pivot. While Doubao boasts over 200 million daily active users, it generates under ¥10 million daily against computing costs in the tens of millions. Enterprise clients offer clearer monetization paths through productivity tools like Seedance, Trae, and Volcano Engine services. ByteDance maintains a dual-track approach: free consumer access to preserve user base, while pursuing B-side revenue. The challenge is converting this into sustainable profits before funding pressures mount, with current enterprise customers still heavily reliant on ByteDance's consumer ecosystem rather than traditional industries like finance or manufacturing.

title: 麦肯锡最新报告：未来5年，最有价值的3种人
content: McKinsey's report identifies "alignment cost" as the hidden drag in traditional hierarchies—training, meetings, and approvals that bridge human capability gaps rather than create value. As AI reduces these costs through three phases (human-to-human, human-to-code, human-to-agent), organizational power shifts from position-based to output-based to capability-based. Most companies remain stuck in "augmentation" ( embedding AI in old workflows); true "reinvention" requires redesigning work around AI-native coordination. For individuals, the imperative shifts from execution to judgment, from training-dependent to shareable skills, and from assigned roles to self-directed contribution.

title: 一家美国公司选择100%接入DeepSeek的原因
content: San Francisco-based Lindy switched 100% of its AI operations from Claude to DeepSeek v4 after its AI bills exceeded total payroll. The migration, though ten times more work than expected, cut costs dramatically while improving performance on core tasks like email classification and automated replies. DeepSeek's June releases—DSpark speculative decoding (60-85% speed boost) and Wayfinder Router (offline microsecond routing)—enable faster, cheaper deployment. The case signals market maturation: enterprises now layer models, using premium Claude for complex reasoning and cost-optimized DeepSeek for high-frequency "muscle" work.

title: 费曼学习法
content: The Feynman Technique improves learning through four steps: select one small concept and teach it from memory; identify gaps and revisit source material precisely; explain in plain language using everyday analogies; and integrate into daily routines for consistent practice. The method emphasizes understanding over memorization, targeting weak points directly, and making complex ideas accessible. Recommended books include *The Feynman Technique*, *How to Read a Book*, *Atomic Habits*, *Thinking, Fast and Slow*, *The Willpower Instinct*, *Mindset*, and *Peak*.

content: Baidu's AI chip subsidiary Kunlun Chip plans a Hong Kong IPO targeting a $50 billion valuation. The company submitted its listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on January 1 and will remain a Baidu subsidiary after the spin-off. Some investors were reportedly required to purchase 3-7 times their planned subscription amount in chip products to participate. ByteDance has been rumored as a potential customer, while Tencent is already a client.

title: 马斯克宣布 Grok 4.5 开启 SpaceX 与特斯拉内部私测，性能或超越 Opus
content: Musk announced on June 28 that Grok 4.5 has begun internal testing at SpaceX and Tesla. The model is built on the 1.5-trillion-parameter V9 base and incorporates data from AI coding tool Cursor. Early evaluations suggest performance rivaling or exceeding Anthropic's Claude Opus. Reinforcement learning continues to improve the model, and the "Grok Build" benchmark is being refined. Musk also stated SpaceX will release entirely new models trained from scratch monthly for the remainder of 2025.

title: 曝贾扬清已从英伟达离职

His departure stems from underperforming DGX Lepton operations, NVIDIA's broken 2026 open-source commitment conflicting with his philosophy, and bureaucratic product management culture. He recently joined GPU cloud provider Hyperbolic as advisor. The move signals difficulty extending hardware monopoly into software layers and middleware platform value challenges.

title: 每7个中国人就有1个想偷吃它。药典和柳叶刀联合警告：你不是它的适应人群 | 原文
content: Metformin, a first-line drug for type 2 diabetes, is being misused by some Chinese adults seeking weight loss or anti-aging benefits. Medical authorities, including the Chinese Pharmacopoeia and The Lancet, warn it is not approved for these purposes. The drug carries risks for non-diabetic users, including vitamin B12 deficiency and lactic acidosis. Healthcare professionals emphasize metformin requires medical supervision and is not a wellness supplement for the general population.

title: Highlights from Git 2.55
content: Git 2.55 introduces incremental multi-pack index repacking, allowing `git repack --write-midx=incremental` to append MIDX layers without rewriting existing metadata; combined with geometric repacking, it compacts layers logarithmically. The experimental `git history fixup` applies staged changes to earlier commits. Config-based hooks can now run in parallel. Linux gains filesystem monitor support via inotify. Bitmap generation is faster, and `--path-walk` works with more filters. New features include `git format-rev`, masked terminal control sequences in sideband output, autostash for checkout merge conflicts, remote groups for push, `--graph-lane-limit`, `--max-count-oldest`, and negotiator reference controls.

title: 花旗与大摩怎么看康宁GlassBridge：短期扰动FAU情绪，对光模块龙头影响有限
content: Citigroup and Morgan Stanley assess that Corning's new GlassBridge fiber-to-PIC connection platform poses limited near-term impact on AI optical module leaders. The technology, which uses ion-exchanged glass waveguides to replace traditional fiber array unit (FAU) coupling, faces design finalization hurdles for current and 2027 CPO solutions, requiring extensive validation before potential 2028-2030 adoption. While creating potential disruption risk for FAU manufacturers and causing valuation volatility for FAU-dependent companies, GlassBridge can serve both CPO and NPO architectures, preserving transceiver integrators' system-level value. Major module producers including Eoptolink, Innolight, and T&S are considered largely unaffected, with Tinzec's active optical engine business buffering long-term exposure.

title: Inside the Advisory Database and what happens when vulnerability volume breaks records
content: GitHub's Advisory Database processed over 6,000 advisory decisions monthly from March-May 2026, with published advisories reaching 1,560 in May—more than five times the typical output. Private vulnerability reports surged from ~550 to over 3,000 weekly, repository advisories from ~650 to 5,000 weekly, and CVE requests hit nearly 4,000 in May. Despite infrastructure remaining stable and quality standards unchanged, review times extended to multiple weeks due to increased complexity: package disambiguation, version range reconstruction, multi-ecosystem verification, and conflicting upstream data. GitHub is scaling curation systems, deploying AI-assisted research tools, improving automation, and prioritizing risk-based review to adapt to this structural ecosystem shift toward greater vulnerability transparency.
